identity.mission: Create a high-performance, athletic, dark-mode KPI tracker that feels like a tactical command center, not a spreadsheet.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Fitness Tracker' aesthetics with 'Financial Dashboard' precision.
Emotion First: The user should feel 'Locked In' and 'Productive'.
Content is King: The numbers (KPIs) are the heroes. Make them big and legible.
Contrast: High contrast neon against deep obsidian backgrounds.

theme.background_strategy: Deep Obsidian (#09090B) with subtle noise texture to prevent banding.

headings.usage: All KPI numbers, big stats, and section titles.

body.usage: Labels, inputs, list items, help text.

typography.installation: Import 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in index.css

usage_rules: Use Primary Orange (#F97316) for 'Call to Action' and 'Earnings' progress.
Use Success Green (#22C55E) ONLY for 'Profit' and 'On Track' status indicators.

layout.strategy: Mobile-First Bento Grid (Mode B - High Density)
layout.grid_system: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 md:p-8
layout.spacing_scale: Generous internal padding (p-6) for cards to let data breathe.

sections.header: Sticky top, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl), contains Date Toggle.
sections.hero: Full width (col-span-full) 'Earnings Command Center'. Big progress bar.
sections.actions: 2x2 Grid of large touch-friendly buttons for quick data entry.
sections.stats_stack: Vertical stack of KPI cards (Calls, Bookings, Profit).
sections.history: Drawer or bottom section for log history.

custom_components.name: KPICard
custom_components.description: A dark card with a glowing top border (using primary/secondary colors), big number, label, and a mini progress bar.
custom_components.style: bg-zinc-900 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-5 relative overflow-hidden

custom_components.name: ActionGrid
custom_components.description: Grid of big buttons for 'Add Call', 'Add Booking', etc.

custom_components.name: ProgressBar
custom_components.description: Custom animated progress bar with 'glow' effect.

shadcn_modifications: Card: Remove default shadows, add 1px white/10 border.
Button: Use 'h-12' or 'h-14' for mobile touch targets. Pill shapes.
Dialog: Use Drawer (Sheet) on mobile for 'Add' actions instead of center modal.

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle SVG noise overlay to the body background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'tracing beam' effect or simple top-border highlight for active states.

images.description: Abstract Gold Cubes - Use as a subtle background or header image for the 'Spins' modal or section.
Neon Blue Lines - Use as a background for the 'Earnings' Hero card (with low opacity overlay).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. CSS: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (Zinc 950, Orange 500, etc).
3. LAYOUT: Build the 'Dashboard' page first. It's the core.
4. LOGIC: Ensure the 'Biweekly' calculation logic (1st-14th, 15th-End) is robust in the backend, but Frontend must display the current period clearly.
5. MOBILE: Test everything on mobile view. Buttons must be thumb-friendly.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all inputs and buttons (e.g., 'add-call-btn', 'booking-time-input').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
